page.onboarding.footer: Trusted by millions, LBE Wallet is a secure wallet making web3 accessible to all.
page.onboarding.terms.agree: I have read and agree to the Terms of Use
page.onboarding.terms.paragraph.1: Welcome to LBE Wallet. Please read and understand these terms before continuing.
page.onboarding.terms.paragraph.10: Within the scope allowed by law, losses caused by your own mistakes, device risks, or third-party risks are your responsibility.
page.onboarding.terms.paragraph.11: We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use after an update means you accept the updated terms.
page.onboarding.terms.paragraph.2: LBE Wallet is a decentralized wallet tool. We do not custody your Secret Recovery Phrase, private keys, or password.
page.onboarding.terms.paragraph.3: You are responsible for safeguarding your password, Secret Recovery Phrase, and private keys. Any leak may lead to permanent loss of assets.
page.onboarding.terms.paragraph.4: If you lose your password, Secret Recovery Phrase, or private keys, LBE Wallet cannot help you recover access or assets.
page.onboarding.terms.paragraph.5: You acknowledge that on-chain transactions are irreversible. Once broadcast and confirmed, transactions usually cannot be reversed.
page.onboarding.terms.paragraph.6: You agree to use this product only in compliance with the applicable laws and regulations in your jurisdiction, and you assume all usage risks.
page.onboarding.terms.paragraph.7: LBE Wallet makes no warranty regarding any third-party DApp, website, smart contract, or their security.
page.onboarding.terms.paragraph.8: Before signing, authorizing, or sending transactions, carefully verify the address, amount, chain network, and transaction details.
page.onboarding.terms.paragraph.9: You understand and agree that network congestion, gas changes, or on-chain exceptions may cause delays or failures.
page.onboarding.terms.title: Terms of Use
page.onboarding.title:
Welcome to
LBE Wallet

page.review.recovery.skip.title: Skip account security?
page.review.recovery.skip.warning: I understand that I may lose access to my account and assets if I do not back up my Secret Recovery Phrase.
page.review.recovery.tip3: . Write it down in the correct order and keep it safe. Anyone with this phrase can access your wallet. Never share it with anyone.
page.review.recovery.title: Save your Secret Recovery Phrase
page.secret.recovery.phrase.description: A Secret Recovery Phrase, also called a seed phrase or mnemonic phrase, is a set of words that gives access to your crypto wallet. You need it to restore or move your wallet.
page.secret.recovery.phrase.list.title: Anyone with your Secret Recovery Phrase can:
page.secret.recovery.phrase.question.cor: Write it down, engrave it on metal, or store it securely in multiple private locations. If you lose it, it cannot be recovered.
Correct. No one can recover your Secret Recovery Phrase for you.
page.secret.recovery.phrase.question.err: If you lose your Secret Recovery Phrase, it is gone forever. No one can recover it for you, no matter what they claim.
Incorrect. No one can recover your Secret Recovery Phrase for you.
page.secret.recovery.phrase.question.opt: You should give it to them
page.secret.recovery.phrase.question.pro: If you lose your Secret Recovery Phrase, LBE Wallet...
If anyone, even a support agent, asks for your Secret Recovery Phrase...
page.secret.recovery.phrase.reveal.expla: provides full access to your wallet and funds; please do not screenshot, forward, or share it with anyone.
page.secret.recovery.phrase.reveal.overl: Make sure no one is watching your screen.
page.secret.recovery.phrase.reveal.qr.ti: Use this QR code only in an offline, secure environment when backing up your Secret Recovery Phrase.
page.secret.recovery.phrase.reveal.title: Reveal Secret Recovery Phrase
page.secret.recovery.phrase.reveal.warni: Make sure no one is looking at your screen. LBE Wallet Support will never ask for this.
page.secret.recovery.phrase.title: What's a Secret Recovery Phrase?
